name: Detection: scheduled task from AppData — extend with parse_json extracts computed task name column

input.query:
let Filters = dynamic(['AppData', '%localappdata%', '%appdata%']);
let Exclusions = dynamic(['OneDriveStandaloneUpdater.exe', 'OneDriveLauncher.exe']);
DeviceEvents
| where ActionType in ('ScheduledTaskCreated', 'ScheduledTaskUpdated')
| where AdditionalFields has_any (Filters)
| extend ParsedFields = parse_json(AdditionalFields)
| extend ScheduledTaskName = tostring(ParsedFields.TaskName)
| where not(AdditionalFields has_any (Exclusions))
| project Timestamp, ReportId, DeviceId, DeviceName, ActionType, InitiatingProcessAccountUpn, ScheduledTaskName
